creator: mike@sentex.net
text:
I think I am hitting this bug as well periodically.  Of the 3 times I saw it, once back in November on zoo.freebsd.org while updating telegraf, and then on a VM running stable from Jan 31s and then on a FreeBSD 14.2R box a week or so ago. 

Any ideas how to force the issue ? I had a test box running on an EPYC 7302P, running 12hrs 
while true
do
service telegraf restart
sleep $(jot -r 1 16 95)
done
but nothing.  Reading through this bug thread, it seems maybe the box needs to be up a while ?


prior to the crash this popped up on each of the machines

and just now in a VM a similar sort of pattern.  uid 884 is telegraf and I was mucking about with the configuration.
